trending_videos.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
trending_videos.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu s

trending_videos.title: Dead by Daylight | Jason | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
The mask is on. The machete is dripping. The massacre has begun.   
Dead by Daylight: Jason.  

06. 16. 26. 

Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits. Pick a side and step into a world of tension and terror with horror gaming's best asymmetrical multiplayer.      

PLAY DEAD BY DAYLIGHT: https://buythegame.deadbydaylight.com/   

Join the official forum:  https://forums.bhvr.com/dead-by-daylight/

 Like and follow us on our official Social Media Channels:     
- Facebook:  https://facebook.com/DeadByDaylight
- Twitter:  https://twitter.com/DeadbyDaylight
- Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/deadbydaylight/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@deadbydaylight 

#DbD

trending_videos.title: Vegas Golden Knights at Colorado Avalanche
trending_videos.description: The Colorado Avalanche face the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 2 of the Western Conference Final. Vegas leads the series 1-0 following a 4-2 victory in the opener. Goaltender Adin Hill prepares to anchor the crease for the Golden Knights.

trending_videos.title: Golden State Valkyries at Indiana Fever
trending_videos.description: The Golden State Valkyries travel to Gainbridge Fieldhouse to face the Indiana Fever. Golden State seeks to rebound after losing to Chicago, while Indiana beat Seattle 89-78 behind 21 points from Caitlin Clark in an early-season matchup.

trending_videos.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Trailer | Varun | Mrunal | Pooja | David | In Cinemas 5th June 2026
trending_videos.description:
Get ready for fun, romance & full entertainment! 🎬✨
Presenting the Trailer of Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai starring Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur & Pooja Hegde, directed by David Dhawan.
A perfect mix of comedy, love, confusion & family drama awaits you on the big screen! ❤️🔥

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor:

trending_videos.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Second Round
trending_videos.description: The second round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson tournament continues at TPC Craig Ranch. The player field battles the standard 36-hole cut line as only the top 65 golfers and ties advance to the competitive weekend in McKinney, Texas.
